title: nem-catalog v1
description: Machine-readable URL catalog for AEMO NEMWEB. Maps (dataset, time_range) to candidate URLs for the four NEMWEB repositories: Reports, MMSDM, NEMDE, FCAS_Causer_Pays.

schema_version.description: SemVer of the JSON Schema itself. MAJOR bump is breaking; SDKs reject unknown major versions.

catalog_version.description: CalVer of this catalog artifact. Corresponds to the crawl date. Optional .N suffix for multiple releases on the same day.

as_of.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the mirror crawl that produced this catalog completed.

source_mirror_commit.description: Git commit hash of nemweb-mirror/ used to generate this catalog. Enables provenance auditing.

placeholders.description: Global vocabulary mapping each placeholder name (used in path_template and filename_template) to its format, example, and regex. Non-Python consumers use this to expand templates.

example.description: Concrete example value conforming to the format.

regex.description: Regular expression matching the placeholder's valid values.

dataset_keys.description: Curated user-facing subset of dataset keys. Excludes extractor AUX placeholder entries and utility file types. Index into `datasets` map.

raw_keys.description: Full set of dataset keys the extractor emitted, including AUX and utility entries. Index into `datasets` map. For tool-builders and debugging.

datasets.description: Map of dataset key to record. Every entry in dataset_keys and raw_keys has a corresponding entry here.

intra_repo_id.description: Repo-specific identifier. For MMSDM: uppercase table token. For Reports: stream subdir name. For NEMDE: filename prefix before first digit run. For FCAS_Causer_Pays: always CAUSER_PAYS.

resolvable.description: True if the catalog can produce concrete URLs for this dataset. False for directory-level anomalies (e.g., NEXT_DAY_OFFER_ENERGY)SPARSE) or AUX placeholder entries. resolve() raises UnresolvableDatasetError on resolvable=false.

tiers.description: Map of tier name to pattern record. Tier names are repo-specific (CURRENT/ARCHIVE for Reports; DATA/CTL/BCP_FMT/MYSQL/DOCUMENTATION/etc for MMSDM; NEMDE_Files/File_Readers for NEMDE; ANNUAL for FCAS_Causer_Pays). Single-tier repos have a map of one entry.

query_shape.description: What inputs are required to resolve this dataset and what the output looks like. Per-record user affordance; complements the global placeholders dictionary.

schema_source.description: URL to authoritative schema documentation for this dataset. Populated for MMSDM (portal root); null for Reports and NEMDE in v0.1.

anomaly_note.description: Human-written note for edge cases: malformed names, case variance, multi-view granularity splits, deprecation, etc.

Tier.description: A single (tier, pattern) record. For Reports CURRENT: rolling 5-min data. For Reports ARCHIVE: daily rollups. For MMSDM views: per-view data files.

path_template.description: URL path template with placeholder tokens (e.g., /Reports/ARCHIVE/DispatchIS_Reports/). Prefix with https://nemweb.com.au to build absolute URLs.

filename_template.description: Filename template with placeholder tokens. Null for directory-level anomalies with no resolvable files.

filename_regex.description: Regex matching valid filenames. Null if filename_template is null.

example.description: Concrete example filename to eyeball the template.

cadence.description: How often new files appear (5min, daily, daily_rollup, monthly_bulk, annual, etc.).

time_granularity.description: Which placeholder carries the content timestamp (e.g., yyyymmdd, yyyymmddHHMM, yyyymm, yyyy).

retention_hint_unverified_days.description: Approximate retention window for rolling tiers, derived from a single mirror snapshot. NOT a guarantee. Applies only to Reports/CURRENT; omitted for append-only tiers.

observed_range.description: Min/max of content-time token observed in mirrored filenames. Does NOT imply continuity or completeness.
